summary: The presence of acidophilic owl-eyed nucleoli signifies Reed-Sternberg cells characteristic of Hodgkin lymphoma, confirmed by co-expression of CD15 and CD30. Given the age, anatomical site, and immunoprofile, nodular sclerosing Hodgkin’s lymphoma best explains these findings as it is the most prevalent subtype in young adults with such presentations.
